hero.title: Smart Agricultural Solutions for a Sustainable Future
hero.desc: At Agrika we deliver integrated solutions for designing, implementing and managing modern agricultural projects—from traditional farming to greenhouses, hydroponics, agricultural marketing and specialized training—to increase production and maximize return on investment with the latest technologies.
hero.tagline: Turn your idea into a successful agricultural project with us

footer.description: Agrika is a leading Egyptian company for integrated agricultural solutions: projects, greenhouses, hydroponics, irrigation, crop and livestock production, training, and crop marketing.

about.title: About Us
about.heading: Agrika — Integrated Agricultural Solutions
about.intro1: Agrika is a leading Egyptian company in integrated agricultural solutions, bringing together agricultural engineers, consultants, veterinarians, and experts in management and agricultural marketing.
about.intro2: We offer end-to-end services covering study and planning, implementation, operation, follow-up, marketing, and training—to ensure the success and sustainability of agricultural projects and the best economic return for our clients.
about.pipelineLine: Study & planning – Implementation – Operation – Follow-up – Marketing – Training
about.intro3: Our expertise combines science with hands-on practice to deliver measurable results in the field.
about.visionText: To be among the best agricultural companies in Egypt, the Middle East and Africa in modern agriculture, smart farming, hydroponics, and professional agricultural marketing.
about.missionHtml:
• ✔ Increase production
  • ✔ Reduce costs
  • ✔ Improve crop quality
  • ✔ Maximize profits
  • ✔ Preserve natural resources
about.whyHtml:
• ✔ Strong hands-on experience in agricultural projects
  • ✔ End-to-end solutions from idea to sale
  • ✔ Latest modern and hydroponic farming technologies
  • ✔ Specialized engineering, consulting and veterinary team
  • ✔ Professional training academy
  • ✔ Strong local and export marketing network
  • ✔ Competitive pricing and high quality
  • ✔ Ongoing support after implementation
about.founderBio: Agricultural engineer specialized in designing, implementing and managing modern agricultural projects, with practical experience in greenhouses, hydroponics, crop and livestock production, and agricultural marketing. He leads Agrika with a clear vision to turn agriculture into a profitable, sustainable investment.

services.title: Agrika Projects Division
services.description: Design and implementation of agricultural projects, feasibility studies, and farm planning.
services.details:
Design and implementation of agricultural projects
Professional feasibility studies
Farm design and planning
Integrated projects (crops – livestock – poultry)
Farm management and operation
services.extended:
We turn ideas into clear execution documents: master layouts, quantity estimates, and a phased timeline you can track monthly. When needed, we align crop and livestock modules to share inputs (water, feed, energy) and reduce cost.

After go-live, optional follow-up packages (field visits, production KPIs, operational tweaks) help sustain returns.
services.highlights:
• Documented economic & technical feasibility
  • Integrated crop / livestock / poultry design
  • Contractor & supplier coordination on request
  • Operation plans with suggested KPIs
services.scope: Typically covers site visit, soil & water data (as applicable), concept design, indicative BOQ, and supporting documents for finance or partnerships.
services.process:
1. Brief, goals, and budget envelope
  2. Site survey and data collection
  3. Design options and cost bands
  4. Final layout and execution support to handover

services.title: Agrika Greenhouses Division
services.description: Plastic and glass greenhouses with climate and ventilation systems.
services.details:
Design and build plastic and glass greenhouses
Cooling, ventilation and climate control
Greenhouse operation to boost production
services.extended:
Cover type and structure follow local climate and crop (vegetables, flowers, seedlings, etc.). We size ventilation, shading, and irrigation to limit heat stress.

Seasonal run-books and maintenance notes for nets, fans, and controllers are included.
services.highlights:
• Plastic or glass to match budget
  • Climate stack: cooling, heating, humidity
  • Integration with irrigation & drainage
  • Operator training for daily checks
services.scope: From first study to handover: bay sizing, paths, storage bays, and utility tie-ins for power and water. Optional sensors can be added later.
services.process:
1. Crop choice and target area
  2. Engineering design and budget bands
  3. Build supervision for mechanical systems
  4. Commissioning and short O&M guide

services.title: Hydroponics by Agrika
services.description: Soilless systems, nutrient programs, and hands-on training.
services.details: Soilless and hydroponic systems: NFT, DWC, drip hydroponics, ebb & flow, aeroponics, vertical farming. Nutrient programs, client training on operation and management.
services.extended:
We match crop, footprint, and budget to the right system (e.g. NFT for leafy greens). EC/pH schedules and common deficiency symptoms are explained clearly.

Where suitable we reduce water use via recirculation, with a periodic sanitation plan for tanks and lines.
services.highlights:
• NFT, DWC, drip hydro, ebb & flow
  • Nutrient recipes and correction tables
  • Vertical layouts when space is tight
  • Hands-on daily monitoring training
services.scope: Unit supply or custom design, pumps & timers, commissioning, and training for the crop lead.
services.process:
1. System & crop selection
  2. Hydraulic layout and tank sizing
  3. Install and trial run
  4. Short weekly support, then O&M handover

services.title: Agrika Irrigation Systems
services.description: Drip irrigation and complete networks for better water efficiency.
services.details:
Drip irrigation
Design and installation of complete irrigation networks
Better water-use efficiency
services.extended:
Water demand is sized from soil, crop, and climate. We zone the field for easier maintenance and partial shutdown.

Filtration and, when justified, fertigation options are proposed with clear cost/benefit.
services.highlights:
• Field and greenhouse drip
  • Main & lateral layouts, valves
  • Pressure balance across laterals
  • Annual water demand estimates
services.scope: Site sketch, network plan, indicative BOQ, and install supervision or contractor coordination.
services.process:
1. Areas and water source data
  2. Hydraulic draft design
  3. Build and pressure test
  4. Handover with suggested irrigation calendar

services.title: Plant Production Division
services.description: Programs for field crops, vegetables and fruit with quality focus.
services.details:
Programs for field crops, vegetables and fruit
Production management and quality improvement
Higher efficiency and returns
services.extended:
Programs cover the crop calendar, fertilization and safe IPM, and quality markers (size, colour, shelf life). We can link output to marketing channels when needed.

Optional seasonal visits adjust rates or irrigation timing to real weather.
services.highlights:
• Field crops, vegetables, fruit
  • Production & quality follow-up
  • Less waste and fewer common pest hits
  • Lightweight seasonal reports
services.scope: Technical guidance, suggested input lists, and follow-up on critical growth stages as agreed.
services.process:
1. Crop and area definition
  2. Season plan and inputs
  3. Field follow-up
  4. Harvest review and next-season notes

services.title: Animal & Poultry Production
services.description: Poultry, sheep and cattle farms with full veterinary supervision.
services.details:
Poultry, duck, sheep and cattle farms
Feeding and health management programs
Full veterinary supervision
services.extended:
Ventilation, waste handling, and preventive health reduce flock/herd stress. We align feeding with output (eggs, meat, milk) and operating cost.

Vaccination and parasite-control calendars follow approved protocols and farm conditions.
services.highlights:
• Poultry, duck, sheep, cattle
  • Feed programs and conversion
  • Preventive health follow-up
  • Capacity and batch planning
services.scope: Pen layout, movement flow, water and feed points, and environmental needs per species.
services.process:
1. Species and target capacity
  2. Shed plan and services
  3. Gradual stocking
  4. Weekly then monthly checks

services.title: Agrika Training Academy
services.description: Certified courses in hydroponics, greenhouses, and farm management.
services.details: Professional courses on hydroponics, greenhouses, modern farm management, crop production, feasibility studies and agricultural marketing. Hands-on training with recognized certificates.
services.extended:
Sessions blend compact lectures with practical demos or training rigs. We focus on common operating mistakes and how to read key metrics (humidity, EC, daily yield).

Separate tracks for new investors and for growers upgrading an existing farm.
services.highlights:
• Hydroponics, greenhouses, farm management
  • Feasibility & agricultural marketing
  • Hands-on labs and attendance certificates
  • Q&A and short post-course support
services.scope: Course schedules, simplified handouts, and optional hand-off to Agrika technical teams for later consulting.
services.process:
1. Pick your learning track
  2. Theory + practice
  3. Quick assessment and feedback
  4. Certificate and next-step advice

services.title: Agrika Crop Marketing Division
services.description: Commission-based sales linking growers with traders and exporters.
services.details: Commission-based marketing and sales for growers: vegetables, fruit and field crops, linking producers with traders and exporters, negotiating the best prices, fast off-take, and export support.
services.extended:
We help with sampling, packing, and delivery windows that match market demand. For export we coordinate basic inspection and paperwork requirements with the right parties.

Commission terms are agreed upfront with transparent pricing and statements.
services.highlights:
• Direct links to traders & exporters
  • Negotiation and faster off-take
  • Export support when conditions allow
  • Clear, pre-agreed commission
services.scope: Crop quality and volume check, channel matching, and delivery follow-up as contracted.
services.process:
1. Register crop and location
  2. Price indication and channel fit
  3. Coordinate supply or export steps
  4. Collection follow-up and feedback

projects.title: Modern greenhouse projects
projects.description: Plastic and glass structures with climate control and irrigation.
projects.details: Implementation of modern greenhouses with cooling, ventilation, and precision irrigation to boost yield and crop quality.

projects.title: Advanced hydroponic systems
projects.description: Design and operation of high-yield soilless systems.
projects.details: NFT and deep water culture systems with team training on nutrient management and controlled environments.

projects.title: Farms, irrigation & marketing
projects.description: Crop and livestock production, drip networks, and crop marketing.
projects.details: Integrated projects covering production, irrigation networks, and follow-up marketing of the harvest.

articles.title: The future of hydroponics in Egypt
articles.description: How technology reduces water use while increasing output.
articles.details: Hydroponics offers finer control over nutrition and climate, and scales well for investors who want gradual expansion.

articles.title: Choosing the right greenhouse system
articles.description: Climate, crop type, and budget before you decide.
articles.details: Greenhouse choice depends on crop, local climate, and operating budget. A feasibility study and a clear maintenance plan are essential.

articles.title: Agricultural marketing: from field to market
articles.description: Connecting farmers with the right channels for fair pricing.
articles.details: Early marketing planning reduces risk. Working with trusted networks helps move produce quickly, including export when needed.
